# scheduledRecurring

**Type Property**

A recurring, scheduled temporal event trigger.

## Declaration

```swift
static var scheduledRecurring: INTemporalEventTriggerTypeOptions { get }
```

## Temporal Event Triggers

- **notScheduled**: No temporal event trigger scheduled.
- **scheduledNonRecurring**: A single scheduled temporal event trigger.

items.description: A single scheduled temporal event trigger.
